description.en: Attacks 2 enemies, the target and the <color=#28d9ed>enemy with the highest Speed</color>. Has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color>.
description.kr: 적 2인을 공격합니다. 지정한 대상과 <color=#28d9ed>속도가 가장 빠른 적</color>을 공격합니다. <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-20%</color> 감소시킵니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵2体にダメージを与える。敵単体と<color=#28d9ed>最もスピードが速い敵</color>を攻撃する。<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-20%</color>DOWNさせる。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击2名敌人。攻击所选目标和<color=#28d9ed>速度最快的敌人</color>。有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-20%</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高,则该技能伤害越高。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to steal <color=#28d9ed>all</color> <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color> from the target.\nIncreases damage dealt proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>모두</color> 빼앗습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>すべて</color>奪う。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率夺取目标的<color=#28d9ed>所有</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。\n自身的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.jp: (パッシブ効果)残りHPが低いほど<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>がUPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)生命值越低,<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高。

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Light

description.en:
Always increases Penetration by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and Critical Hit Chance by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.

Grants <color=#28d9ed>Continuous Recovery</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color> at the start of battle (Irremovable).
Reduces enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color> at the end of the turn.
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>을 부여합니다. (해제 불가)
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp:
常時貫通力が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、会心率が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。

戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>持続回復</color>を付与する。(解除不可)
ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh:
穿透力始终提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,暴击率始终提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>

战斗开始时,赋予<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。(无法解除)
回合结束时,敌队CP减少<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
